mapper.sql: id, record_id, bucket_name, object_key, local_file_path, file_size, part_size, total_part_count, uploaded_parts, upload_status, user_id, user_shard, client_type, device_id, concurrent_threads, start_time, complete_time, last_update_time, created_time, updated_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM resume_upload_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY last_update_time DESC
SELECT FROM resume_upload_record WHERE upload_status = #{uploadStatus} ORDER BY last_update_time DESC
SELECT FROM resume_upload_record WHERE upload_status IN ('PAUSED', 'IN_PROGRESS') AND last_update_time < #{expireTime}
mapper.update: UPDATE resume_upload_record SET upload_status = #{uploadStatus}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE record_id = #{recordId}
UPDATE resume_upload_record SET uploaded_parts = #{uploadedParts}, last_update_time = #{lastUpdateTime}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE record_id = #{recordId}
